suite.name: suite S1779379087674 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Given The User Is On The Login Page
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Given The User Is On The Login Page' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Given The User Is On The Login Page' found.

kw.name: When The User Logs In With Valid Credentials
Then The User Should Be Redirected To The Products Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access saucedemo.com and log in with valid username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce'. The user should be redirected to the products page and the title 'Products' should be displayed.
test.status: No keyword with name 'Given The User Is On The Login Page' found.

test.name: TC_002 — Login With Invalid Credentials

kw.name: Given The User Is On The Login Page
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Given The User Is On The Login Page' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Given The User Is On The Login Page' found.

kw.name: When The User Logs In With Invalid Credentials
Then An Error Message Should Be Displayed For Invalid Credentials
And The User Should Remain On The Login Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access saucedemo.com and attempt to log in with incorrect username 'wrong_user' and password 'secret_sauce'. An error message should be displayed and the user should remain on the login page.
test.status: No keyword with name 'Given The User Is On The Login Page' found.

test.name: TC_003 — Login With Locked Out User

kw.name: Given The User Is On The Login Page
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Given The User Is On The Login Page' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Given The User Is On The Login Page' found.

kw.name: When The User Logs In With Locked Account Credentials
Then An Error Message Should Be Displayed For Locked User
And The User Should Remain On The Login Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access saucedemo.com and attempt to log in with locked username 'locked_out_user' and password 'secret_sauce'. An error message should be displayed indicating the user is locked out and access is denied.
test.status: No keyword with name 'Given The User Is On The Login Page' found.

suite.doc: Test suite for SauceDemo login scenarios
